settings.title: Free over ₹300. Next-working-day dispatch from Gandhinagar.
settings.subtitle: Delivery times across India, why we ship dry (no cold chain), tracking, and edge cases.

settings.heading: How long it takes to reach you.
settings.item_1_desc: Mumbai, Delhi, Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Kolkata, Ahmedabad. 2–3 working days from dispatch.
settings.item_2_desc: Jaipur, Lucknow, Indore, Surat, Kochi, Chandigarh, etc. 3–5 working days.
settings.item_3_desc: Smaller towns, NE states, J&K, A&N Islands. 5–7 working days. Some pin codes 7–10 days.
settings.item_4_desc: Orders over ₹300. Below that, ₹49 flat. COD adds ₹20 per order.
settings.item_5_desc: Available at checkout for metro cities. ₹149 flat. Next-working-day delivery on orders placed before 12pm IST.
settings.item_6_desc: UAE, Singapore, Australia, UK, US. ₹1,200–2,400 depending on weight. 7–14 days. Customs not included.

settings.heading: No cold chain. By design.
settings.body:
Our kits ship as dry components — spice mixes, jars, salts, ferment-boost prebiotics. The live bacteria are in the air around your kitchen and on the surface of the vegetables you'll add.

This means no refrigerated trucks, no "keep cold" stickers, no risk of failed cultures because a logistics partner left a box on a sunny dock for 6 hours.

The lone exceptions: dairy starters (yogurt, kefir cultures) ship in foil sachets at room temperature — they're freeze-dried and stable.

settings.heading: You'll know where it is.
settings.item_1_desc: Tracking link sent the moment we hand the order to the courier (usually within 18 hours of order placement).
settings.item_2_desc: Order page on our site (logged in) shows live status. Or visit the courier's site directly with the AWB number.
settings.item_3_desc: Delhivery (default), Bluedart (express), India Post (some pin codes). All provide real-time updates.

settings.heading: Edge cases
settings.intro: What happens when shipping doesn't go smoothly.
settings.q_1: My order says delivered but I didn't receive it.
settings.a_1: WhatsApp us within 48 hours of the "delivered" status. We file a courier investigation (usually returns the package or confirms loss within 5 working days). If lost, free reshipment.
settings.q_2: My package is delayed past the estimated date.
settings.a_2: Up to 3 working days past estimate is normal in India. Past that, message us — we'll escalate with the courier and either expedite or offer partial shipping refund.
settings.q_3: I gave the wrong address. Can I change it?
settings.a_3: Yes if it hasn't shipped — message us, we'll update before dispatch. After shipping, address changes are at the courier's discretion (sometimes possible for ₹50–100, sometimes not).
settings.q_4: Can I refuse delivery and get a refund?
settings.a_4: For COD orders: yes, courier returns to us, full refund (no reverse-ship cost since you didn't pay yet). For prepaid: also yes, but treat as a regular return (refund minus return-ship cost).
settings.q_5: International order — do I pay customs?
settings.a_5: Yes, on arrival in your country. We don't pre-pay customs because rates vary by destination and product category. UAE: typically ₹0 for fermentation kits. UK/US: ₹400–1,200 depending on order value. Singapore: usually ₹0.

settings.title: Need to track an order?
settings.desc: Have your order number ready. We'll pull up the live status.
